description: Multi-seed re-run of E04 algorithm comparison. Extends the single-seed E04 (seed=42) to 10 independent seeds for statistical reliability. Provides confidence intervals and seed-effect ANOVA.
paired_comparison_note: All optimizers see the same circuit per trial. Circuit seed = base_seed + trial (shared). Optimizer internal seeds differ (+10k/+20k/+30k) only to decouple stochastic trajectories.
review_gap_closed: MEDIUM: E04 uses single seed (seed=42). This experiment extends to 10 seeds for confidence intervals and seed-effect testing.
